meaning: adj.(在质地、香味、颜色等上)像饼干的
examples: They are also very, very delicious: biscuity and crunchy and crumbly and chocolaty.
Denbies’ sparkling wine tastes biscuity and refreshing; it will soon be the only English bubbly in stock in the classiest house-label range at Sainsbury’s, a big supermarket.
Try his sessionable, biscuity Sutton Hoo American amber ale.
